narrative:
Lancaster City 5-A (precinct in Fairfield County) has 764 registered voters, with 65.3% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 15.4%, a modest Republican lean of 3.8 percentage points.
